title: Text
description: PsychoPy Text component for displaying text

id.description: Unique identifier for the text component

text.description: The text to be displayed. Use $ prefix for dynamic variables (e.g., $stimText)

units.description: Units to use when positioning the text

color.description: Text color. Use $ prefix for dynamic values (e.g., white, red, $[1,0,0], $colorVar)

pos.description: Position on screen (x, y). Use $ prefix for dynamic positioning (e.g., $position)

letterHeight.description: Specifies the height of the letter (the width is then determined by the font)

ori.description: Orientation of the text in degrees

draggable.description: Should this stimulus be movable by clicking and dragging?

languageStyle.description: Handle right-to-left (RTL) languages and Arabic reshaping

wrapWidth.description: How wide should the text get when it wraps? (in the specified units)

startTime.description: Start time to display the component in milliseconds

endTime.description: End time to display the component in milliseconds
